items.title: Upgrade Amazon EKS clusters with confidence using Kubernetes version rollbacks
items.snippet: Learn how Kubernetes version rollbacks for Amazon EKS let you reverse cluster upgrades within seven days. This new feature provides a safety net for upgrade failures—no cluster rebuilds required—turning Kubernetes version upgrades into a reversible, low-risk…
